dashboard.summary: Here is how your business is performing today.

modulesPage.title: Modules companies need to operate with control
modulesPage.intro: Hisab ERP is organized around complete business workflows, not isolated screens. The first phase prioritizes finance, sales, purchasing, inventory, business contacts, reporting, security and local compliance.

priorityCopy.Must have: Required for a dependable ERP foundation
priorityCopy.Should have: Important as the company and team grow
priorityCopy.Growth: Add after core operations are stable

moduleDetail.statusTitle: Architecture defined — workflow development is next
moduleDetail.statusDescription: The module contract, required capabilities and controls are now documented in the application. Database tables, permissions, forms and posting logic will be implemented incrementally.

finance-accounting.title: Finance & Accounting
finance-accounting.description: The financial source of truth for every sale, expense, payment, tax, asset and closing period.
features: Profit and loss, balance sheet and cash flow

sales-invoicing.title: Sales & Invoicing
sales-invoicing.description: Manage quotations, sales orders, invoices, receipts, returns and customer balances from one workflow.

purchasing-expenses.title: Purchasing & Expenses
purchasing-expenses.description: Control spending from request and approval through purchase order, supplier invoice and payment.

inventory-warehouse.title: Inventory & Warehouse
inventory-warehouse.description: Track products, stock movements, valuation, reorder levels and transfers across locations.

customers-suppliers.title: Customers & Suppliers
customers-suppliers.description: A shared business directory with credit terms, tax details, contacts, balances and complete activity history.

security-approvals-audit.title: Security, Approvals & Audit
security-approvals-audit.description: Protect company data with role-based access, approvals, audit logs and accountable user activity.

reports-analytics.title: Reports & Analytics
reports-analytics.description: Give owners and managers real-time operational, financial and exception reporting.

localization-compliance.title: Localization & Compliance
localization-compliance.description: Configure company, branch, currency, language, tax and document rules for the market where the business operates.

human-resources-payroll.title: Human Resources & Payroll
human-resources-payroll.description: Manage employees, attendance, leave, payroll inputs, contracts and workforce costs.

fixed-assets.title: Fixed Assets
fixed-assets.description: Register company assets and calculate depreciation, transfers, maintenance and disposals.

budgeting-projects.title: Budgeting & Projects
budgeting-projects.description: Plan budgets and track project revenue, costs, milestones and profitability against actual results.

integrations-automation.title: Integrations & Automation
integrations-automation.description: Connect payments, banks, e-commerce, messaging and external systems through secure APIs and workflows.
